Go MCP Printer - Test Page

This is a sample text file for testing the print_text and print_file tools.

tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam,
quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris.

Printer Information:
- Tool: print_file
- Format: Plain Text
- Date: Test document
